name: Can Hankendi
title: Postdoctoral Researcher, Boston University
bio: I study sustainable and carbon-aware computing systems, with a focus on making large-scale AI infrastructure power-aware, grid-interactive, and operationally transparent.
researchSummary: My research sits at the intersection of computer systems, energy systems, and climate-aligned infrastructure. I build methods for making large-scale compute more power-aware, grid-interactive, and operationally transparent.
